fork_status_and_schedule.highlight: Glamsterdam devnet-7 stable; Erigon and Grandine being onboarded as final clients
devnet-8 targets spec cleanup changes (repricing EIPs) and another fork transition test; timeline ~1-2 weeks
Plan: devnet-8 for smooth fork transition, devnet-9 as non-finality/chaos-focused devnet

testing_progress.highlight: Death Star added to devnet-7 for chaos testing; malicious Prysm node also incoming this week
Lodestar fork-transition bug: spread operator blew the stack on large SSZ Merkle trees; fixed
Stable containers ~10-20% slower across clients; optimization round needed before testnet
Main devnet-7 EL issue: gas accounting inconsistencies; SSZ container performance at fork transition was the bigger surprise

el_breakout_bal_json_rpc.highlight: BAL-specific JSON RPC methods inconsistent across clients; Toni created alignment PR against execution-apis
EIP-7997 contracts factory: Toni's EELS PR to add factory via irregular state transition; consensus is to close it — factory already in Genesis, check adds unwanted witness entries

eip_status.highlight: All devnet-7 EIPs satisfy SFI criteria per EIP-7723; proposal to formally SFI at next ACDE/ACDC Thursday
EIP-7773 Meta EIP for Glamsterdam to be moved to Review status; no objections raised

action_items.action: Align BAL-related JSON RPC methods across EL clients before devnet-8; review Toni's execution-apis PR
Formally move devnet-7 EIPs to SFI at next ACDE/ACDC call

decisions.decision: devnet-8 to run discv5-only (no discv4); confirmed support from Besu/Nimbus EL
All devnet-7 EIPs ready to SFI pending ratification at next ACD call Thursday
EIP-7773 Glamsterdam Meta EIP to move to Review status; no objections
EIP-7997 EELS irregular state transition PR to be closed; factory existence check unnecessary and adds unwanted witness entries

targets.target: Glamsterdam devnet-8: ~1-2 weeks; focus on fork transition with repricing EIP cleanups
Glamsterdam devnet-9: non-finality chaos devnet targeting within ~1 month
